figures.caption: Fig. 16. Comparison of mean PSNR convergence with standard deviation band (Left) and boxplots (Right) for Alt-CC-PINN, Alt-PINN and Simul-CC-PINN using the frequency-hopping strategy to invert the Fresnel low-frequency dataset FoamTwinDielTM 345 (a) and high-frequency dataset FoamTwinDielTM 678 (b).

Fig. 13. Ground truth (a) and final reconstructed images for Alt-CC-PINN (b, e), Alt-PINN (c, f) and Simul-CC-PINN (d, g) using the frequency-hopping strategy to invert “Austria” lossy targets (small cylinders: εr = 12, σ = 0.05 S/m; large ring: εr = 9, σ = 0.10 S/m). SNR= 20 dB. Top: reconstructed permittivity; Bottom: reconstructed conductivity.

Fig. 9. Comparison of mean PSNR convergence with standard deviation band (Left) and boxplots (Right) for Alt-CC-PINN, Alt-PINN and Simul-CC-PINN using the simultaneous multi-frequency processing strategy to invert “Austria” dielectric targets. εr = 6 (a); εr = 7 (b); εr = 8 (c). SNR= 20 dB.
